# Story Backlog

Use this backlog as the local index for candidate epics, adoption work, and
selected future story packets.

Do not create every possible story packet up front. Create story packets when
work is selected, when adoption needs a durable scope, or when a product,
maintenance, validation, or harness decision needs a place to land.

For existing-project adoption, add an adoption story and name the first real
product, maintenance, or harness-adaptation story after adoption. Do not
retroactively catalog every historical feature unless the human explicitly asks
for that cleanup.
